articles.title: Andrew Flintoff set to be named new Sydney Thunder BBL coach
articles.description: Former England allrounder is set for his first franchise coaching role overseas after two seasons in the Hundred with Northern Superchargers outside of his current England Lions role

articles.title: Sarah Taylor appointed England Men's Test fielding coach for New Zealand series
articles.description: Taylor set to become first female coach to work with senior England men's team

articles.title: Liam Dawson retires from first-class cricket with immediate effect
articles.description: Allrounder played four Tests for England alongside more than 200 appearances for his county

articles.title: Marcus North confirmed as England Men's new national selector
articles.description: Durham's director of cricket takes over after lengthy search to replace outgoing Luke Wright

articles.title: Nahid Rana rips through Pakistan to seal a final-session win for Bangladesh
articles.description: This is now Bangladesh's third consecutive win against Pakistan, after they won the 2024 series by 2-0 margin

articles.title: Shabnim Ismail reverses retirement and makes South Africa T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The 37-year-old fast bowler last played international cricket in 2023 but will be on the plane to England this June

articles.title: Bangladesh government asks committee to look into 2026 T20 World Cup fiasco
articles.description: The three-man committee will look into all aspects of the decision that led to Bangladesh being removed from the tournament by the ICC

articles.title: ECB weighs up options for maiden England tour of Nepal
articles.description: Potential for T20I tour to be included in 2027-31 FTP, following T20 World Cup thriller

articles.title: Glamorgan's Tom Norton makes history with hat-trick on debut
articles.description: Somerset rocked to 32 for 6 second innings as 18-year old runs riot with four dismissals

articles.title: [WATCH] Shahid Afridi conferred Pakistan’s second-highest civilian award Hilal-e-Imtiaz, joins elite list of cricketing icons
articles.description: The recognition was presented by Pakistan President Asif Ali Zardari during an official ceremony at Aiwan-e-Sadr.

articles.title: Rob Key hails Ollie Robinson as ‘World-Class’ after England Test recall against New Zealand
articles.description: England will meet New Zealand in the first Test on June 4.

articles.title: Marcus North replaces Luke Wright as England's national selector
articles.description: The former Australian all-rounder replaces Luke Wright, who stepped down from the role due to personal reasons.

articles.title: Liam Dawson retires from first-class cricket with Hampshire
articles.description: Liam Dawson have scored more than 10,000 runs and claimed over 350 wickets in more than 200 appearances for the county.

articles.title: Barbados Royals rebrand as Barbados Tridents under landmark ‘One Barbados’ partnership
articles.description: The Caribbean Premier League 2026 is set to begin on August 8.
